notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds singles on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Henry Davis scores. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Brandon Nimmo.

notableEvents.label: Oneil Cruz reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, second baseman Josh Smith to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Marcell Ozuna out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Josh Jung. Nick Gonzales scores. Billy Cook to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.
